Patch Set 4: Verified

Tests received by maloo, run on CentOS release 5.7/x86_64: (https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sessions/3e6e0f08-40aa-11e1-b06e-5254004bbbd3).  Ran 13 tests.  No failures.

Patch Set 4:

This is to just rebase master from previous review http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,1803

Patch Set 4: I would prefer that you didn't submit this

(8 inline comments)

I think this script should be called mdd-survey.sh, to indicate that it is testing the MDD device, and not to be confused with a future mdt-survey.sh that is testing RPCs to the MDT device.  This is similar to the distinction between obdfilter-survey.sh and ost-survey.sh

If Di disagrees, then I'm fine with his decision, but I thought I should bring this issue up.

Patch Set 4:

I actually had thought to add another parameter (Layer=${Layer:-"mdd"}) to indicate which layer this survey will hit.  So later, we can set this to mdt or osd, when we complete other layer for this tool. 

Maybe we should call this mds_survey, (or mdt_survey). but indicate in readme that it only support mdd layer now.

Patch Set 6: Fails

(1 inline comment)

I get a crash if I do the following on a VM:

1. /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/llmount.sh 
2. mds-survey

This is on Lustre Master build #448.

Patch Set 6:

Richard, I have reproduced this issue when clients are mounted. This is not this patch/script defect. It's a bug in the feature. Please file a Jira ticket for this issue and not blocking this patch
Uploaded patch set 7.

Tests received by maloo, run on CentOS release 5.7/x86_64: (https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sessions/cdb5ed58-50a3-11e1-8144-5254004bbbd3).  Ran 17 tests.  No failures.

Patch Set 7:

Tests received by maloo, run on CentOS release 6.2/x86_64: (https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sessions/a0dd4838-51e0-11e1-949e-5254004bbbd3).  Ran 13 tests.  No failures.

Patch Set 7: Looks good to me, approved

We still need a lustre/tests/mds-survey.sh test script that tests basic functionality of this code, so that problems like LU-80 are not introduced in the future.

Patch Set 7:

I will create another patch for the sanity test
Patch Set 7: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve
Change has been successfully cherry-picked as 24f601a0d459d48449d2e16b00f6ff3a889ed3b3.

parents.subject: LU-506 tests: check lustre.conf for modprobe

commit.subject: LU-633 iokit: mds-survey script for MD echo client test
commit.message:
LU-633 iokit: mds-survey script for MD echo client test

Create a mds-survey script to run echo client for MDS

Signed-off-by: Minh Diep <mdiep@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I425438aa294d8d4360c28f686296ff7f26f847ea
